emails.subject: Charged twice this month?!
emails.summary: Customer was charged $49 twice on July 3rd and wants the duplicate charge fixed.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Dana, thank you for flagging this and I'm sorry for the frustration — especially since this isn't the first billing issue you've had. I've escalated the duplicate $49 charge from July 3rd to our billing team for review, and if it's confirmed we'll refund it right away. I'll follow up with you within one business day with an update. Thanks for your patience.

emails.subject: Requesting a refund for order #4471
emails.summary: Customer wants a refund for Pro plan order #4471 because it lacks a needed export feature.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Marco, thanks for reaching out, and sorry the Pro plan didn't have the export feature you were looking for. I've started the refund process for order #4471 (purchased July 8) — you should see the funds back on your original payment method within 5–7 business days. If you'd like, I'd be happy to pass your export feature need along to our product team. Thanks for giving us a try!

emails.subject: URGENT: dashboard completely down
emails.summary: Entire team blocked by 503 errors on dashboard since 7am; critical for dispatch operations.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi, thank you for the report and we're so sorry for the disruption — we understand how critical the dashboard is for your dispatch operations. Our engineering team has been alerted and is actively investigating the 503 errors as our top priority. We'll send you updates as soon as we know more, and you can also follow our status page for real-time progress. We'll follow up directly the moment service is restored.

emails.subject: You folks are amazing
emails.summary: Customer thanking support team, especially Priya, for excellent data migration help.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Jenny, thank you so much for taking the time to write this — it truly made our day! We've shared your kind words with Priya and the whole team; she'll be thrilled to hear the migration went smoothly. We're lucky to have customers like you. Don't hesitate to reach out anytime!

emails.subject: You have been selected — act now
emails.summary: Unsolicited crypto giveaway scam urging recipient to click a link to claim a prize.
emails.suggested_reply: No reply recommended — flagged as spam.

emails.subject: Feature request: dark mode
emails.summary: Requests a dark mode option for comfortable late-night use of the app.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Sofia, thanks so much for the suggestion! Dark mode is a popular request and we've added your vote to our feature backlog. We can't promise a date yet, but we'll let you know as soon as it ships. Thanks for using the app so regularly — it means a lot!

emails.subject: App crashes when uploading CSV over 10MB
emails.summary: App crashes every time when uploading CSV files larger than about 10MB.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Tom, thank you for the clear, detailed report — the steps to reproduce are really helpful. We've logged this as a bug and flagged that it may be related to last week's update. Our engineering team is investigating, and we'll follow up as soon as we have a fix or a workaround. Sorry for the disruption in the meantime!

emails.subject: How do I add a second user to my account?
emails.summary: Wants to know if a second user can be added to the existing plan.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi! Great question — yes, you can add your business partner as a second user. Depending on your current plan, additional seats may be included or available as a small add-on. I'd be happy to check your account and walk you through the steps — just confirm the email address you'd like to add. We'll also pass along your feedback about the help docs so this is easier to find.

emails.subject: Invoice #20458 shows wrong company name
emails.summary: Needs invoice #20458 re-issued with corrected company name for tax purposes.
emails.suggested_reply: Hello, thanks for flagging this and apologies for the typo! We'll correct the company name to 'Fernwood Cafe' and re-issue invoice #20458 right away. You should receive the corrected copy within 1–2 business days — we'll confirm as soon as it's sent so your accountant has what they need.

emails.subject: This is unacceptable
emails.summary: Sync broken for two weeks, two emails ignored; demands a fix or a refund.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Greg, I'm truly sorry — two weeks with broken sync and no reply from us is not the experience you should have had, and I understand your frustration. I've escalated your case to the top of our queue and a senior engineer is looking at your sync issue today. I'll personally follow up within 24 hours with a status update, and once it's resolved we'll discuss a credit for the affected period. Thank you for giving us the chance to make this right.

emails.subject: Wondering about API access
emails.summary: Asks whether Starter plan includes API access, where docs are, and about nonprofit discounts.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Amara, thanks for reaching out! Yes, the Starter plan includes API access — you can find the documentation in your dashboard under Settings > API, or on our docs site. We do offer a nonprofit discount as well; just reply with your organization's details and we'll get that applied. Happy to help if you have any other questions!

emails.subject: Guaranteed ranking on page 1
emails.summary: Unsolicited SEO marketing pitch offering guaranteed page-1 rankings at a discount.
emails.suggested_reply: No reply recommended — flagged as spam.

emails.subject: Payment failed but card is fine
emails.summary: Payment failed and account shows past due despite valid card; needs access before client demo tomorrow.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Noel, sorry for the trouble — I know timing matters with your demo tomorrow. We're looking into the failed charge on our end now; occasionally payments are declined by the processor even when the card is fine. Your access won't be interrupted while we sort this out. We'll follow up shortly with an update or a quick way to retry the payment. Thanks for your patience!

emails.subject: Small praise + a tiny suggestion
emails.summary: Loves new reports feature; requests ability to schedule weekly automated report emails.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi Rachel, thank you so much for the kind words — we're thrilled the reports feature is saving you time! Scheduled email reports is a great suggestion, and I've passed it along to our product team. We'll let you know if it makes it onto the roadmap. Thanks again for taking the time to share!

emails.subject: Cannot access account after password reset
emails.summary: Account locked after password reset; needs urgent same-day access to payroll information.
emails.suggested_reply: Hi there, sorry about the lockout — I understand this is urgent with payroll involved. We're unlocking the account on our end right away and will send a fresh, secure reset link to your office manager's email. If anything still blocks access after that, we'll call you at (555) 014-2298 to sort it out today. Thanks for your patience!
